evidence.claim: The system allows assigning an immediate slot to emergency flights.
evidence.fact: The system immediately gives a declared emergency flight the earliest possible slot.
evidence.user_story_span: assign an immediate slot to emergency flights

evidence.claim: The system allows re-queuing other flights.
evidence.fact: The system re-queues displaced flights by the normal rules.

evidence.fact: The system immediately gives a declared emergency flight the earliest possible slot.
evidence.user_story_span: the emergency flight is moved to the front of the queue
evidence.fact_span: immediately gives a declared emergency flight the earliest possible slot

evidence.claim: When the interaction occurs, the system assigns an immediate slot.
